context: Tests whether the agent generates a correct XML sitemap index with gzip-compressed child sitemaps for products, collections, and pages, includes image entries in product sitemaps, uses the sitemap npm package, applies correct field values (changefreq, priority), and pings Google after generation.

checklist.name: sitemap npm package used
checklist.description: The solution imports from the 'sitemap' package (e.g. SitemapStream, streamToPromise) rather than building XML string concatenation manually for product sitemaps

checklist.name: Sitemap index structure
checklist.description: Generated sitemap index XML contains entries for at least: a products sitemap, a collections sitemap (collections.xml.gz), and a pages sitemap (pages.xml.gz)

checklist.name: 50,000 URL limit per child sitemap
checklist.description: Product data is split across multiple child sitemaps with a maximum of 50,000 URLs per file (i.e. Math.ceil(total / 50000) files are created)

checklist.name: Gzip compression
checklist.description: Child sitemap files are gzip-compressed (e.g. using gzipSync from 'zlib') and saved with a .gz extension

checklist.name: Product sitemap filename pattern
checklist.description: Product child sitemap files follow the naming pattern products-{N}.xml.gz (e.g. products-1.xml.gz, products-2.xml.gz)

checklist.name: Product entry fields
checklist.description: Each product entry in the sitemap includes: url, lastmod (ISO 8601 string), changefreq set to 'daily', and priority set to 0.8

checklist.name: Image entries in sitemap
checklist.description: Product sitemap entries include an img array with at least url and title per product image

checklist.name: Image title fallback
checklist.description: Image title uses the image's alt text when available, falling back to the product title

checklist.name: Google ping after generation
checklist.description: After sitemaps are generated, the script sends an HTTP request to https://www.google.com/ping?sitemap=... to notify Google

checklist.name: Sitemap index uses lastmod
checklist.description: Each <sitemap> entry in the index includes a <lastmod> element with the current timestamp in ISO format

checklist.name: Offset-based pagination
checklist.description: Product sitemaps use offset-based database queries (limit=50000, offset=(page-1)*50000) to paginate through the full catalog

checklist.name: Sitemap output in public directory
checklist.description: Sitemap index is saved as sitemap.xml in the public directory root; child sitemaps go into a public/sitemaps/ subdirectory
